Author: BlueWaveXIV
Name: AutoList
Description: AutoList turns retainer Market Board chores into supervised AutoList, AutoRefresh, and Consolidate Retainers workflows with a small in-game tray that lights up when your character is ready to start.
Punchline: Turn retainer listing from market-board chore into one-click momentum.
Changelog:
Added Consolidate Retainers to pull listings from sparse AutoList retainers, adopt them into AutoList if needed, and hand off to AutoList for relisting.
Added a configurable sparse-retainer threshold in settings.
Added a green Consolidate Retainers button under Refresh Items For Sale in the overlay tray.
Added /autolist consolidate.
